item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-display-name","requestedField":"display_name","summary":"The generator marks every User property not listed in `required` as optional. I found `id` and `name` are the only required fields, so I’m adding `display_name` only under the OpenAPI properties and regenerating from that source of truth.","commandsRun":["pwd && rg -n \"User|display_name|properties:\" api/openapi.yaml package.json pnpm-lock.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -n 160 && git status --short","sed -n '1,140p' api/openapi.yaml && sed -n '1,180p' package.json && sed -n '1,180p' generated/api-client.ts && rg -n \"getUser|User|email_address|mobile_number|account_status|timezone_name\" . --glob '!node_modules' --glob '!generated/api-client.ts'","sed -n '1,220p' scripts/generator-core.ts && sed -n '1,180p' scripts/generate-client.ts && sed -n '1,220p' scripts/check-generated-files.ts && sed -n '1,160p' tests/client.test.ts"]}

item.text: {"version":"1","taskId":"add-display-name","requestedField":"display_name","summary":"The OpenAPI edit is in place. The repository’s `pnpm generate:api` command hit a sandbox restriction when the `tsx` CLI tried to open its IPC socket, so I’m using the same TypeScript loader without that CLI socket to run the unchanged generator, then I’ll execute all requested checks and report any sandbox-specific fallback clearly.","commandsRun":["pwd && rg -n \"User|display_name|properties:\" api/openapi.yaml package.json pnpm-lock.yaml 2>/dev/null | head -n 160 && git status --short","sed -n '1,140p' api/openapi.yaml && sed -n '1,180p' package.json && sed -n '1,180p' generated/api-client.ts && rg -n \"getUser|User|email_address|mobile_number|account_status|timezone_name\" . --glob '!node_modules' --glob '!generated/api-client.ts'","sed -n '1,220p' scripts/generator-core.ts && sed -n '1,180p' scripts/generate-client.ts && sed -n '1,220p' scripts/check-generated-files.ts && sed -n '1,160p' tests/client.test.ts","git diff -- api/openapi.yaml && pnpm generate:api"]}
